title: BigID Catalog Object
description: Schema describing a single object record in the BigID Data Catalog. Returned by GET /api/v1/data-catalog and related catalog endpoints.

objectName.description: The display name of the object (e.g. file or table name).

type.description: Object type (file, table, column, container, model, prompt).

source.description: The data source the object was discovered in.

fullObjectName.description: Fully-qualified object name including container and source.

attribute.description: Classifier attributes attached to the object.

has_duplicates.description: Whether duplicates of this object exist in the catalog.

duplicate_id.description: Identifier shared by all duplicates of this object.

scanner_type_group.description: Scanner family that produced this object (e.g. database, file, cloud-storage).

update_date.description: Last time the object's metadata was updated.
